global_constraints.sqlite_absolute_rejection: SQLite is absolutely rejected for Handshake: no runtime, tests, fixtures, mocks, examples, fallbacks, cache, compatibility adapters, temporary harnesses, imports, exports, or product paths may use SQLite. PostgreSQL/EventLedger/ArtifactStore are the only accepted storage and evidence direction for this consolidation.
global_constraints.ckc_scope: CKC remains source evidence only. This inventory creates no CKC rebuild stubs and does not grant CKC runtime, namespace, Electron, localhost-intake, or SQLite authority in Handshake.
global_constraints.product_code_availability: This worktree contains only .GOV governance files. GOV_KERNEL_ONLY.md states product code (src/, app/, tests/) does not belong here, so product anchors below are candidates from packet evidence rather than locally verified source files.

source_evidence.finding: Governance-kernel-only worktree; no product code tree is present here.
Canonical reference map for preserved Handshake stubs, conflicts, consolidation decisions, and proposed microtask buckets.
Consolidation law: preserve CKC and existing Atelier/Lens-adjacent intent; reject CKC SQLite/Electron/localhost runtime assumptions.
Overlap rows OVR-001 through OVR-012 map CKC source clusters to Handshake owners.
Active Ready for Dev packet with 75 microtasks and a no-SQLite rule.
Projection lists preserved stubs, overlap rows, rejected options, risks, and MT-009 through MT-012 scope.
Task-board states for active, stub, validated, superseded, and historical-failure packets.
Registry states and supersession/fold-in notes for Atelier/Lens, Photo/Studio, media/Loom/ASR/artifact, visual-debug, and consolidation packets.

mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.preserved_intent: Additive remediation for failed or gapped Atelier Lens work; preserve role claiming, SceneState, and ConflictSet.
mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.dependency_overlap_notes: Fold into Atelier/Lens core alongside Photo Studio, Atelier Collaboration Panel, Lens Extraction Tier, and CKC character-sheet identity evidence. Sparse machine contract means Markdown projection must be preserved as source evidence.

mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.preserved_intent: Selection-scoped Atelier Collaboration Panel with role suggestions, range-bounded apply, validator rejection outside selection, provenance, and evidence refs.
mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.dependency_overlap_notes: Reuse as a validated baseline for CKC/Atelier sheet and text-edit workflows; do not reopen as a new stub.

mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.preserved_intent: Make LensExtractionTier first-class: Tier0/Tier1/Tier2, Tier1 default, explicit override, requested/effective trace, and invalid-tier validation.
mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.dependency_overlap_notes: Feeds Lens projection/search behavior and CKC source classification; risk is confusing extraction tier with content tier or allowing implicit Tier2 creep.

mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.preserved_intent: ViewMode UI and enforcement for Lens outputs: NSFW default, explicit SFW toggle, SFW hard-drop projection, immutable raw/derived artifacts, and trace-visible metadata filter.
mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.dependency_overlap_notes: Validated projection law to reuse for CKC media evidence and sidecar visibility; raw artifacts must remain immutable.

mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.preserved_intent: Calendar Lens is a Lens-pattern source with UI/API workflow, source filters, title search, stable IDs, provenance, and optional read-only timeline/Flight Recorder overlay.
mt_009_existing_handshake_atelier_lens_s.dependency_overlap_notes: Keep separate from media/Atelier consolidation; useful only as an adjacent Lens pattern.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Photo Studio remediation must preserve skeleton surface, thumbnails, and recipes.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Overlaps CKC media viewer/DAM, character media panes, thumbnail generation, and recipe/ComfyUI lineage.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Make Studio and Design Studio surfaces explicit runtime citizens with jobs, workflow nodes, tool surfaces, DCC/operator projection, Flight Recorder linkage, Locus/task-board/WP linkage, and PostgreSQL-only state.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Central bridge for CKC automation/manual/debug and ComfyUI lineage; specific risk is fragmented UI panels or hidden side effects.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.state: stub_backlog_not_activated; high value; high risk; blocked
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Unify Stage capture/import sessions and Media Downloader outputs under portable artifact manifests, bundle indexes, retention semantics, bounded exports, and storage-portable evidence.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Foundation dependency for CKC media lineage and intake; should precede downstream Loom bridge/archive packets to avoid competing manifest semantics.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.state: stub_backlog_not_activated; high value; high risk; blocked
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Define backend lineage from Stage-captured/imported media to governed ASR transcript artifacts with source hashes, media probe facts, capture/session provenance, timing anchors, and searchable transcript linkage.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Shared source identity contract for Stage, ASR, Loom, Lens, and archive flows.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Local-first ASR transcription job for audio/video media, deterministic ffmpeg extraction, transcript artifacts with timing metadata, Loom/search attachment, capability gating, and Flight Recorder progress.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Supports large video archive search and transcript Lens retrieval; no cloud transcription by default.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Turn archived/imported video into Loom library objects with searchable transcripts, captions sidecars, tags/mentions, thumbnail/proxy views, and Lens/Atelier composition.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Depends on Media Downloader, Loom MVP, Media Downloader Loom Bridge, poster frames, and ASR.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Make Media Downloader outputs promotable into Loom as dedup-stable LoomBlocks with captions, metadata sidecars, previews, search, and FR events.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Consumes active Media Downloader v2 and Loom MVP; risk is duplicating artifact versus asset identity.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Generate deterministic Tier-1 poster-frame thumbnails for video assets as background mechanical jobs.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Supports media browsing and archive UI; needs ffmpeg/ffprobe capability gates and deterministic failure codes.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: LoomBlocks, LoomEdges, stable UUID identity, mentions/tags, All/Unlinked/Sorted/Pins views, backlinks, file import, SHA-256 dedup, Tier-1 previews, search, and FR-EVT-LOOM events.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Validated baseline to reuse; historical SQLite references in old packet evidence are superseded by this consolidation's absolute no-SQLite rule.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Re-open Loom portability as narrow remediation/proof, with graph traversal, directional edges, metrics recomputation, and source-anchor durability.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Use as proof baseline; traceability registry says Stub Backlog while task board says VALIDATED, so later reconciliation should clarify wording.

mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.preserved_intent: Artifact store bootstrap, manifests, SHA-256, single atomic Materialize API, retention/pinning/GC, and no random filesystem side effects.
mt_010_adjacent_photo_studio_media_loom_.dependency_overlap_notes: Foundational for CKC media, ComfyUI receipts, exports, backups, contact sheets, sidecars, and validation evidence.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Earlier Atelier/Lens intent can be silently overwritten by CKC scope.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Carry old packet as historical source evidence; preserve v2 gaps explicitly before any rebuild.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Older partial scope can confuse current activation if treated as active.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Use only for source evidence where specific preserved intent is still relevant.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Photo Studio skeleton, thumbnails, and recipes can be lost if CKC media viewer scope dominates.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Preserve Photo Studio v2 as explicit source material in Atelier/Lens/Photo runtime work.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Skeleton work can be mistaken for current Photo Studio completion.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Treat as historical evidence only and define current acceptance in future work.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: v1 source-mode details such as Instagram, forum, captions, progress, and output layout can be lost behind active v2.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Use v2 as active dependency while preserving v1 requirements as historical source material.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Historical closure and smoketest claims can contaminate current CKC/Loom scope.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Use v4 as current proof baseline; retain earlier versions as supersession evidence only.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Visual validation requirements for CKC/Atelier GUI work can be dropped because source stubs are superseded.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Inherit screenshot/visual-diff evidence through Kernel002/Kernel003 visual surfaces; do not reimplement unless coverage is missing.

mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.risk: Premature CKC rebuild work bypasses consolidation and research.
mt_011_prior_packets_for_supersession_ri.mitigation: Keep archived as evidence only. Do not create CKC rebuild stubs until consolidation, greenroom review, and CKC research basis are complete.

local_product_code_evidence.finding: Product code (src/, app/, tests/) does not belong here.
Only GOV_KERNEL_ONLY.md, justfile, kbstart.cmd, orcstart.cmd, .gitignore, and .gitattributes were present outside .GOV.

candidate_anchors_from_packet_evidence.relevance: Existing selection-scoped Atelier UI and API surface for future CKC/Atelier editing and provenance reuse.
Validated selection-bounded patching, suggestion verification, provenance, and ATELIER-LENS-VAL-SCOPE-001 enforcement.
LoomBlock/LoomEdge identity, import/dedup, preview jobs, search, API routes, and FR events are baseline anchors for media/archive/Atelier composition.
Validated media downloader worksurface, output-root posture, Stage Sessions/cookie handling, and operator controls for downstream Loom promotion.
Workflow job family, progress events, item results, external-process handling, and capability posture for archive/intake lineage.

candidate_paths: ArtifactStore/EventLedger/Materialize API surfaces to be verified in product worktree
candidate_anchors_from_packet_evidence.relevance: Single atomic materialization, stable manifests, hashes, retention, pinning, and GC are required by CKC media/ComfyUI/contact-sheet/export behaviors.

candidate_paths: WP-KERNEL-002 CRDT Workspace Write Box contracts
candidate_anchors_from_packet_evidence.relevance: Parallel editing, revision, promotion, session, lease, and artifact evidence boundaries for CKC fold-in.

anchor_caveats: Candidate paths must be verified in the product worktree before implementation because this worktree intentionally omits src/, app/, and tests/.
Any candidate with historical SQLite references must be translated to the current no-SQLite rule; old SQLite storage, FTS5, fixtures, examples, and tests are not reusable implementation anchors.

operator_decision_points: Clarify traceability wording for WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v4, where task board says VALIDATED but registry state text still says Stub Backlog while also declaring active v4.
Keep Calendar Lens separate unless the operator explicitly wants a generalized Lens-pattern abstraction in this consolidation.
Treat archived CKC rebuild stubs as evidence only; do not revive them directly.
summary_findings: MT-009 found current Atelier/Lens anchors split between active consolidation, stub backlog items, and validated baselines.
MT-010 found adjacent Photo/Studio/media/Loom/ASR/artifact work as either source stubs or validated dependencies that must be preserved without reopening completed packets.
MT-011 found major supersession risks around old Atelier/Lens, Photo Studio, Media Downloader v1, Loom portability v1-v3, visual-debug stubs, and premature CKC rebuild stubs.
MT-012 found no product code in this governance-kernel worktree; product code anchors are packet-evidence candidates only.
